form.formComment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.00 last start, beating Paw Until Payday. Solid showing expected.

formComments.comment: Was prominent from the outset and held on well to win at this track over 300m in 17.00 last start, beating Paw Until Payday. Solid showing expected.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off heels, approaching the 484m boxes.

form.formComment: Placed last time (17.16) at this track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Placed last time (17.16) at this track in a Mix 1/2/3, finishing third and beaten 2.25 lengths. Yet to win but has placed four times from this draw. Can hit the frame with the right run.

form.formComment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 4.5 lengths third over 300m this track in 17.19. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been in the minors the last two, the latest showing strong pace early but gathered in and finished a 4.5 lengths third over 300m this track in 17.19. Boxed on well at the latest run to hit the frame. Leading player.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 9 over 300m at this track behind Oscar Dutton beaten half a length (17.03). Not among the main chances this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last four starts. Last time out finished 2nd in a Mix 1/2/3 on April 9 over 300m at this track behind Oscar Dutton beaten half a length (17.03). Not among the main chances this time.

form.formComment: Has finished fourth at this circuit at the last two appearances, most recently when beaten 5 lengths behind Hi Jessie over 300m. Not likely to feature on this occasion.

form.formComment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 4 lengths at this track (17.05) beating Stitched Up Lucy in a Grade 5 on April 2. Tested under these conditions.

formComments.comment: Got back last start and could only manage seventh but before that won easily by 4 lengths at this track (17.05) beating Stitched Up Lucy in a Grade 5 on April 2. Tested under these conditions.

form.formComment: Flew the lids with a fast early split but had to contend with second when clocking 17.00 over 300m at this track. Boxed on well to finish runner-up last time. Leading player.
